versions.version_description: All previous versions have incorrect chords in Bridge and incorrect lyrics.
This one includes corrected chords throughout but specifically in the verses and the bridge.  Also includes the correct intro.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]

[ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]

Oh yeah
Oh yeah


[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        
 So scared of breaking it[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]              
But you won't let it bend[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 And I wrote two hundred letters[/tab]

I will ever send[/tab]

 Sometimes it cuts so much[/tab]

Deeper then they seem[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 You'd rather cover up[/tab]

I'd rather let them be[/tab]


[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
So let me be[/tab]

And I'll set you free[/tab]

Your salty skin and how[/tab]
